lesson.menu_desc: Talk about hobbies and free time -- like + -ing and want + to -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Free Time -- Hobbies and Interests
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 13 -- Free Time

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my free time. After work, I like reading books and listening to music. It is calm and I enjoy it. On Saturday, I like cooking lunch for my family. On Sunday, I want to walk in the park and take photos. I do not like running, but I like swimming. My free time is simple and happy.

Hello, this is Maria. In my free time, I love painting and gardening. I enjoy painting flowers in the morning. In the afternoon, I like watching movies at home. On the weekend, I want to learn to dance, so I want to take a class. I do not enjoy cooking, but my sister loves it. We like spending time together. It is nice.

extra_audio.text: First, say hello. Second, ask: what do you like doing in your free time? Third, say what you like doing. Fourth, say what you want to do this weekend. Fifth, say goodbye.
